tagline: A home-based franchise offering proprietary window film, surface graphics, and protective coatings to residential and commercial clients with a flat-fee royalty and low overhead entry point.
description_short: CoolVu is a home-based window film and surface solutions franchise targeting owner-operators who want to enter a fragmented and growing residential and commercial market. With an investment starting under $70K and a flat monthly royalty structure, the model is designed for low overhead and operational flexibility. The system is backed by affiliate Window Film Depot's 20-plus years of industry experience.
market_intelligence_insight: The global window film market was valued at $12.45 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $18.65 billion by 2033 at a 4.6% CAGR, driven by energy efficiency mandates, UV protection demand, and security glazing adoption. North America holds 33.8% of global market share with strong residential and commercial retrofit tailwinds.
item_19_headline: 2024 territories averaged $3591 per project invoice with a 58% customer closing rate
ongoing_support: field support, phone consultation, online assistance, proprietary CoolVuPRO software, marketing materials, approved supplier network
